title: pulegium cervinum
intro: Pulegium cervinum, also known as Pennyroyal, is a perennial plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its essential oil, which is rich in menthone, pulegone, and other volatile compounds, exhibiting analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Pulegium cervinum have been used to alleviate menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and relieve headaches and fever. Herbal preparations, such as infusions and essential oils, can be used topically or taken internally to harness its health benefits, including improved circulation, reduced stress, and enhanced digestion.
